---
title: "Charlotte Kekewich"
---

## Charlotte Kekewich

**Dates:** (d.1879)

**Maiden name:** (Peard)

### Description

sister of Frances Mary Peard

### Biography

Daughter of Captain George Peard R.N., and sister of Frances Mary Peard, she married (1849) Trehawke Kekewich (1823-1909), of Peamore House, near Exeter. [LG 1906]

### Letters

- Letter from July 12th 1862

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
